Sign In

Share Your Work, Instantly

Create clean, organized link collections with QR codes for conferences, lectures, and presentations, so your audience can access your papers, slides, datasets, and resources in seconds.

Get Started Free

Everything You Need to Share Your Work

Link Collections

Organize papers, datasets, videos, and other resources into a single page your audience can easily navigate.

Your Professional Profile

Every collection includes your name, photo, and links to your professional profiles, so your audience knows who you are and how to connect with you after your talk.

Custom Themes

Create custom stylings to match the look and feel of your presentation, institution, or personal style.

QR Code Generation

Create QR codes for any collection. Add your logo, choose your styling, and download in multiple formats.

Conference Ready

Add a QR code to your final slide and give your audience immediate access to everything behind your talk.

Analytics

See how your resources are used with simple tracking of page views and link clicks.

How It Works

1

Create a Collection

Add your links, organize your content, and adjust the look to match your presentation or institution.

2

Generate a QR Code

Customize the design and download a QR code ready to drop into your slides or poster.

3

Share at Your Event

Your audience scans the code and gets access to your resources instantly.

Make Your Next Presentation More Useful

Give your audience an easy way to access the work behind your talk, while they're still engaged.

Join researchers and educators using AcademiQR to share their work more effectively.

Create Your First Collection

Password must contain:
  • At least 8 characters
  • One uppercase letter
  • One lowercase letter
  • One number
  • One special character (!@#$%^&*)
Your email and login status are stored locally in your browser for 14 days. This data stays on your device and is not shared. Learn more.
